signInToContinue: Sign in to continue to Expenso
sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
resetLinkSent: Password reset link sent to your email
changePasswordRequired: You must change your password before continuing
forgotPasswordText: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
resetRequestFailed: Failed to send reset link. Please try again.
resetFailed: Failed to reset password. The link may have expired.
ssoFailed: SSO authentication failed. Please try again.

mfa.title: Two-Factor Authentication
mfa.subtitle: Add an extra layer of security to your account
mfa.enabledDescription: Your account is protected with two-factor authentication.
mfa.step1Description: Two-factor authentication adds an extra layer of security to your account by requiring a code from your authenticator app.
mfa.step2Description: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, etc.).
mfa.step3Description: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to complete setup.
mfa.verifyDescription: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
mfa.invalidCode: Invalid verification code. Please try again.
mfa.successDescription: Your account is now protected with two-factor authentication.
mfa.disableDescription: Enter your current password to disable two-factor authentication. This will make your account less secure.
mfa.setupError: Failed to start MFA setup. Please try again.
mfa.disableError: Failed to disable 2FA. Check your password and try again.
